dependencies.label: replacement capacity before land drawdown
modernization bridge before land drawdown
replacement patrol capacity before sea drawdown
fire-control sustainment before sea drawdown
replacement bomber capacity before drawdown
standoff bridge before penetrating drawdown
resilient node fielding before legacy command drawdown
ground segment bridge before command drawdown
supplier-qualified equipment before transition crews train
dependencies.rationale: Training and transition planning should follow qualified hardware and support equipment availability.

dependencies.label: trained crews before legacy land drawdown
dependencies.rationale: Public Sentinel transition planning emphasizes concurrent operations, maintainers, operators, and security forces.

dependencies.label: transition crews gate land fielding tranche
dependencies.rationale: Fielding credibility depends on trained maintainers/security forces, not just construction milestones.

dependencies.label: shipyard workforce/material ramp gates SSBN fielding
dependencies.rationale: Public shipbuilding reviews repeatedly identify workforce, supplier, and material timing as delivery drivers.

dependencies.label: dry-dock/test window before sea drawdown
dependencies.rationale: Legacy drawdown depends on modernization and sustainment windows being available.

dependencies.label: replacement sea capacity before legacy drawdown
dependencies.rationale: The replacement program and legacy extension/drawdown share industrial-base timing risk.

dependencies.label: flight-test capacity gates advanced bomber fielding
dependencies.rationale: Public B-21 execution depends on flight test and production ramp stability.

dependencies.label: depot bridge before legacy bomber drawdown
dependencies.rationale: Legacy bomber drawdown should wait for sustainment bridge and replacement readiness.

dependencies.label: advanced bomber fielding before legacy bomber drawdown
dependencies.rationale: Replacement fielding and test capacity reduce retirement gap risk.

dependencies.label: crypto/accreditation before SATCOM terminal integration
dependencies.rationale: NC3 component modernization must integrate into secure force-direction pathways.

dependencies.label: survivable comms integration before legacy NC3 drawdown
dependencies.rationale: Legacy NC3 drawdown depends on replacement communications paths being integrated and tested.

dependencies.label: NC3 accreditation gates land transition training
dependencies.rationale: Strategic platforms depend on credible command-and-control integration.

dependencies.label: NC3 accreditation gates sea modernization test window
dependencies.rationale: NC3 integration is a cross-cutting dependency for sea-leg modernization.

dependencies.label: NC3 accreditation gates bomber operational test
dependencies.rationale: Air-leg fielding depends on command-and-control integration and test readiness.

dependencies.label: funding authority before land supplier qualification
dependencies.rationale: Continuing-resolution or appropriation constraints can delay contract awards and long-lead work.

dependencies.label: funding authority gates land fielding tranche
dependencies.rationale: Fielding work should not start before appropriation/contract authority is released.

dependencies.label: industrial-base funding gates shipyard workforce ramp
dependencies.rationale: Supplier development and long-lead material decisions gate the shipyard ramp.

dependencies.label: material buy decision gates sea fielding tranche
dependencies.rationale: Multi-program material procurement decisions can change downstream fielding dates.

dependencies.label: basing decision gates bomber fielding ramp
dependencies.rationale: Operating-location decisions must be settled before ramping fielding assumptions.

dependencies.label: flight test evidence before certification gate
dependencies.rationale: Certification gates should follow sufficient test and production evidence.

dependencies.label: certification gate before legacy bomber drawdown
dependencies.rationale: Legacy retirement should depend on certified replacement capability, not production alone.

dependencies.label: crypto integration before cyber authorization
dependencies.rationale: Cyber authorization should follow integration evidence.

dependencies.label: cyber authorization gates SATCOM terminal integration
dependencies.rationale: NC3 terminal integration depends on cyber authorization and secure communications posture.

dependencies.label: posture review before land drawdown
dependencies.rationale: Policy/accountability review can constrain the sequence of retirement and replacement events.

dependencies.label: posture review before sea drawdown
dependencies.rationale: Policy/accountability review can constrain the sequence of retirement and replacement events.

dependencies.label: posture review before air drawdown
dependencies.rationale: Policy/accountability review can constrain the sequence of retirement and replacement events.

dependencies.label: appropriation release before land long-lead obligation deadline
dependencies.rationale: Contract authority must be released early enough to obligate funds before expiration.

dependencies.label: land long-lead obligation before supplier qualification completes
dependencies.rationale: Missing the spend-by date can force replan/reprogramming and delay supplier qualification.

dependencies.label: industrial-base decision before sea material-buy spend-by date
dependencies.rationale: Long-lead material buys need obligation authority before the account expires.

dependencies.label: sea material-buy spend-by gates shipyard ramp
dependencies.rationale: Missed obligation windows can starve later shipyard work of material availability.

dependencies.label: basing decision before bomber production-lot spend-by date
dependencies.rationale: Production-lot awards should not assume an unsettled basing/environmental decision.

dependencies.label: bomber production-lot spend-by gates fielding ramp
dependencies.rationale: Compressed obligation windows can delay production capacity and test support.

dependencies.label: cyber policy gate before ATO support spend-by date
dependencies.rationale: ATO support awards need both policy readiness and current-year obligation authority.

dependencies.label: NC3 spend-by gate before terminal integration
dependencies.rationale: If support funds expire before obligation, terminal integration slips or must be re-funded.
